suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align ui-screen-worker/runtime-worker guidance with mission AGENTS policy for agent-browser usage and known baseline validator failures, and add explicit allowed fallbacks when UI state cannot be driven through agent-browser (e.g., demo-only queue-state without debug hooks).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m2 fix reviews flagged inconsistent procedure outcomes: AGENTS marks agent-browser mandatory, while skills currently allow/condition skips differently, causing conflicting followedProcedure reporting across fix-m2-sign-message-preview-from-nested-context, fix-m2-policy-prompt-modal-ttl-reset, and fix-m2-persist-always-allow-to-profile.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit RED-first evidence and accurate skillFeedback deviation reporting in worker handoffs for scrutiny traceability.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-m2-broadcast-policy-decision-payload and fix-m2-allow-once-rollback-reconcile-doc-and-code reviews observed procedure/reporting mismatch around test-first sequencing and omitted deviation disclosure, despite no blocking code defects.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add new MockAppStateProvider debug hook solely for queue manipulation during modal verification.
Agent-browser policy mismatch observation variants repeated across multiple reports.
Runtime-worker followedProcedure wording variants repeated across multiple reports.
